title: QRLargeSize Property
description: Set this property to "True" when the QR code is large in the field of view.
notes:
Setting this property to "True" when the QR code is large for the field of view may increase search speed.

Setting range: True / False

Default: False

See Also: QRLargeSize Property

QRMinContrast Property

Vision Objects: QRLargeSize Property

Code Reader
